film.title: I AM.: SMTOWN LIVE WORLD TOUR in Madison Square Garden
film.overview: Starring 32 artists from SM Town. The movie reflect the past, present and future of each artist with behind-the-scenes footage that follows the stars as they undergo rehearsals, revealing their day-to-day lives and also features interview, video diaries and never-seen-before archive files.

dialogues.dialogue: Thank you.  At least now there'll be something on this album  I can be proud of.  Helen Reddy.  Songs to remind you you're only a woman.
dialogues.cause_raw: having something to be proud of in the album

dialogues.dialogue: the woman who gave our movement an anthem,  who gave us a voice - Helen Reddy!  I'm so proud of you.  Thank you.  If you know the words, I hope you'll sing them along with me.
♪ Voices clear and voices loud  ♪ Here comes a chance for restitution  ♪ To make our mothers proud  ♪ We are daughters  ♪ We are sisters
♪ Voices clear Voices loud  ♪ Here comes a chance for restitution  ♪ To make our mothers proud  ♪ Mm-mm-mm  ♪ Mm-mmmm. ♪
